blended.narrative: Lost Trail is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,925 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 56".
